text:
This is not approved though I thank chinsan for his diligance.

Have been working on a bigger patch that addresses some other issues
that folk have emailed me about between the releases and don't feel
like doing a PORT_REVISION=1 when I am just going to push it out
Saturday.

Committer: Just leave this PR open; I will add my diff to it tomorrow.
